name: Warm Potato & Tuna Salad.
recipeIngredient: 8 oz (240 g) small new potatoes, scrubbed
3 Spring onions, trimmed and finely chopped
2 oz (60 g) tuna chunks in brine, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes in lightly salted water for about 15 minutes, or until tender.
2. While the potatoes are cooking, mix together the spring onions, most of the parsley, lemon juice, vinegar, and olive oil in a bowl.
3. Drain the cooked potatoes and add them to a serving bowl with the dressing. Toss well to combine.
4. Gently fold in the tuna, taking care not to break it up too much. Season with sea salt and ground black pepper. Sprinkle with the remaining parsley.
5. Garnish with lemon wedges and serve while warm.
Preparation time: 10 minutes
Cooking time: 15 minutes
Serves: 1 (275 calories)
Categories: Bread, Fat, Protein, Vegetable
